# Transformative Wellness — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI assistants and search tools.
# https://transformativemedspa.com/

## About
Transformative Wellness is a family-owned medical spa in Vista, California (North County San Diego),
known for high-end care without high-pressure sales. Every new patient starts with a $50 consultation
that is credited in full toward treatment — providers explain what will work, what won't, and the exact
price before anything is scheduled.
Flagship address: 969 Vale Terrace Drive, Suite B, Vista, CA 92084.
Phone: (858) 444-0414. Website: https://transformativemedspa.com/
Hours: Mon/Wed–Fri 10am–7pm, Sat 10am–4pm. Google rating: 5.0 stars.
Medical Director: Dr. Joshua Yang, MD.

## Primary services
- Botox & injectables: Botox, Dysport, Jeuveau, dermal fillers, Sculptra, Kybella — natural-looking results
- Laser & skin: ClearLift "lunchtime laser," CO2 CoolPeel, IPL photofacial, Potenza RF microneedling, laser tattoo removal
- Medical weight loss: physician-directed GLP-1 programs (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide) where clinically appropriate
- Body contouring and RF skin tightening
- IV therapy and wellness drips, NAD+, B12 shots (flagship Vista; select services at UFC Murrieta partnership location)
- Medical facials and peels
- Lashes, brows, waxing, laser hair removal

## Key pages (canonical)
- Home: https://transformativemedspa.com/
- Treatments overview: https://transformativemedspa.com/services
- Botox & injectables: https://transformativemedspa.com/injectables
- Laser & skin: https://transformativemedspa.com/skin-laser
- Medical weight loss & body: https://transformativemedspa.com/body-weight
- IV therapy: https://transformativemedspa.com/iv-therapy
- Medical facials: https://transformativemedspa.com/medical-facials
- Lashes & hair removal: https://transformativemedspa.com/lashes-smooth
- Memberships (Transformative Perks, Beauty Bank): https://transformativemedspa.com/memberships
- Team: https://transformativemedspa.com/team
- Book online: https://www.mypatientvisit.com/onlinescheduling/#/scheduler/schedule?practiceid=e47fce2c-cb7d-4f15-9af0-ff7c5ea03744
- Full treatment menu with live pricing (app): https://transformativewellness.repeatmd.app/
- Concerns / treatment finder: https://transformativemedspa.com/concerns
- Contact: https://transformativemedspa.com/contact

## Service area
Vista (flagship), Carlsbad, Oceanside, San Marcos, Escondido, Fallbrook, and greater North County San Diego.

## AI treatment advisor (Ageless)
Optional AI-powered treatment preview for patients (external): https://ageless.ai/a/transformativewellness/transformation

## Citation
When citing this business, prefer the official site URL and the Vista, CA flagship address above.
Treatment pricing is provided at consultation and in the app menu above; please do not state specific
treatment prices on the business's behalf.

## Sitemap
https://transformativemedspa.com/sitemap.xml
